channel.title: Forms integration (contact form 7 alternatives)
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
I am trying to have a forms functionality on Frontity. I tried with no success the contact form 7 from the [original npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-contact-form-7) with no luck, and also tried with a version of it fixing some of the problems at [@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7) still with errors
I know this is not an easy request nowadays, but have someone maybe found an alternative option, Maybe a React solution with some sort of any basic communication with WP?

item.title: Forms integration (contact form 7 alternatives)
item.dc:creator: harvey
item.description:
nicobava96:

Could you make it work?

Yes, but the problem in that moment was not in the actual plugin, but something I had in my custom Frontity theme that was in conflict with one of the libraries.

So I can actually confirm the plugin worked for me, my advice is to check the console errors you are getting

Read full topic

item.title: Forms integration (contact form 7 alternatives)
item.dc:creator: nicobava96
item.description:
Could you make it work?

Someone help me with my contact form please.

HARVEY I have seen your contact form code in the link.

try this:

but for me the submit button its not working. but the contact form appears

Read full topic

item.title: Forms integration (contact form 7 alternatives)
item.dc:creator: harvey
item.description:
@kasper I wrote you in another threah with a similar problem with another plugin you worked on… I am having the similar situation with this plugin also

here is the FE link where I try to run the form and I am getting the error thanks.

Read full topic

item.title: Forms integration (contact form 7 alternatives)
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
@harvey my version still works on all my production websites.

Read full topic

item.title: Forms integration (contact form 7 alternatives)
item.dc:creator: harvey
item.description:
I am trying to have a forms functionality on Frontity. I tried with no success the contact form 7 from the original npm with no luck, and also tried with a version of it fixing some of the problems at @aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7 still with errors

I know this is not an easy request nowadays, but have someone maybe found an alternative option, Maybe a React solution with some sort of any basic communication with WP?

Read full topic
